3171440.name: Emerald Geography
3171440.description:
Emerald Geography is a quiz game that helps you learn the countries and capitals of the world.

Multiple Game Modes

  • Find: In this mode, you'll see the name of a country or capital and must click it on the globe. If you're wrong three times, you'll be taken to the correct location.

  • Type: In this mode, you'll be taken to a country or capital and must type its name. If you make a mistake, you'll get a hint.

  • Explore: Freely explore the world. You'll see the names of countries and capitals as you hover over them.

Learn by Region

  • Africa

  • Americas

  • Asia

  • Europe

  • Oceania

Randomized Quiz

Once you are comfortable with the entire world, use the randomized modes to keep things interesting.

  • Random 10

  • Random 50

Score

Earn more points for quickly getting correct answers.

Multiple Themes

Change the look of the globe and learn in style.
